Notes: Lehman's Jennifer Navarro set new CUNYAC record with 11 three-pointers made
in a single game. Old record was 10 set on 2/23/99 by CSI's Maureen Keag.
Game.Officials: Kenwyn Christian,  Howard Alexander,  Craig Morancie
